scenarios.title: valid credentials land the user on the inventory page with six products
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to the login page, fill valid username and password, click the login button, and observe the inventory page loads with expected content.
expectedAssertions: The 'Products' heading is visible on the inventory page
The shopping cart link is visible

locatorTable.notes: CSS id #user-name implies labelled form field; label text inferred from id name — no DOM snapshot. Fallback: page.locator('#user-name'). See Q1 in plan.
CSS id #password implies labelled password field; label inferred from id name — no DOM snapshot. Fallback: page.locator('#password'). See Q1 in plan.
CSS id #login-button strongly implies a submit button; accessible name unverified — no DOM snapshot. Fallback: page.locator('#login-button'). See Q2 in plan.
CSS class .title + assertion text 'Products' implies page heading; element tag unverified — no DOM snapshot. Fallback: page.locator('.title'). See Q3 in plan.
CSS class preserved — no accessible-name or role evidence available without DOM snapshot. Reviewer should request data-testid='inventory-item' from FE team. See Q4 in plan.
CSS class .shopping_cart_link implies a cart link; accessible name unverified — no DOM snapshot. Fallback: page.locator('.shopping_cart_link'). See Q5 in plan.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q1 unresolved — no visible label confirmed for #user-name
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Check for <label for='user-name'> in devtools; if placeholder text only, use getByPlaceholder(/username/i); if neither, fall back to page.locator('#user-name')

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q1 unresolved — no visible label confirmed for #password
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Check for <label for='password'> in devtools; if placeholder text only, use getByPlaceholder(/password/i); if neither, fall back to page.locator('#password')

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q2 unresolved — button accessible name not confirmed
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect element tag and inner text/value in devtools; update name regex to match exact accessible name or fall back to page.locator('#login-button')

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q3 unresolved — .title element tag not confirmed as semantic heading
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If element is not a semantic heading (h1/h2/etc.), use page.getByText('Products', { exact: true }) or page.locator('.title'); ask FE to add semantic heading tag

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q5 unresolved — cart link accessible name not confirmed
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect aria-label or link text in devtools; if no accessible name, ask FE to add aria-label='Shopping Cart' or fall back to page.locator('.shopping_cart_link')
